docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED APR-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, REYNALDO
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, REYNALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
